# SaaSCalc

> SaaSCalc is a Semantic SaaS Unit Economics Calculator Engine for founders and investors to compute and benchmark LTV and CAC dynamically.

## Main Tools
- [SaaS LTV & CAC Calculator](/)

## Core Concepts
- LTV (Customer Lifetime Value)
- CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost)
- ARPU (Average Revenue Per User)

## Contact
- Website: https://hero-tool-mvp.vercel.app
- Email: contact@saascalc.com
